Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and language skills, promoting appreciation of cultural diversity through topics like '私の国・町' (My country/town) (Target 4.7).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course provides language skills applicable to the tourism industry, indirectly supporting Target 8.9, through topics like '買い物・食事' (shopping/dining) and '私の国・町' (my country/town).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course is '對全校開放選修' (open to all students), promoting social inclusion (Target 10.2). Learning about another culture ('私の国・町') fosters intercultural understanding.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: A very minor link to Target 11.4 (safeguard cultural heritage) can be inferred from the course topic '私の国・町' (My country/town), which involves describing local culture.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The syllabus explicitly states '維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍' (Respect Copyright. Use genuine books), promoting ethical consumption and awareness for sustainable practices (Target 12.8).
evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍。

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The instruction to '維護智慧財產權' (Respect Copyright) supports the rule of law (Target 16.3) regarding intellectual property rights.
evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍。
